capabilities.name: Tenant and Identity Foundation
capabilities.description: Provides tenant isolation, user identity, authentication, and authorization context for all learner and admin operations.

capabilities.name: Course and Lesson Management
capabilities.description: Manages course and lesson lifecycle, publication state, and structured content delivery metadata.

capabilities.name: Enrollment and Progress Tracking
capabilities.description: Tracks learner enrollment status and progress state across lesson and course completion milestones.

capabilities.name: Assessment Delivery and Attempts
capabilities.description: Supports assessment definition, learner attempts, scoring outcomes, and pass/fail decisions tied to learning progression.

capabilities.name: Certification Lifecycle
capabilities.description: Issues, verifies, expires, and revokes certificates based on completion and assessment outcomes.

capabilities.name: Basic Learning Analytics
capabilities.description: Produces foundational learner progress and course performance metrics for operational reporting.

capabilities.name: Generic Notification Orchestration
capabilities.description: Dispatches platform notifications for core lifecycle events through generic channels (in-app, email, and push).
